heading: Repealed. ,Oct. 25, 1951, ch. 562, § 1(25)65 Stat. 639
label: 25 to 25b Repealed. ,Oct. 25, 1951, ch. 562, § 1(25)65 Stat. 639
notes: Section 25, , , related to transfer of records of United States land office to any State upon closing of last United States land office in that State.act May 28, 1926, ch. 415, § 144 Stat. 672

Section 25a, , , related to transfer of field notes and maps of United States land office to any State upon closing of last United States land office in that State.act May 28, 1926, ch. 415, § 244 Stat. 673
Section 25b, , , related to requirement that State provide by law for preservation and access of records, field notes, and maps.act May 28, 1926, ch. 415, § 344 Stat. 673
See section 3301 et seq. of Title 44, Public Printing and Documents.
